label: Ad Spend
definition: Total ad spend in the period across all paid platforms (Meta primary).
weakness: Reflects ad_snapshots cron — may lag live Meta by up to 24h. UTM attribution pre-2026-03-30 unreliable.
notes: Pulled by ad-snapshot cron daily 06:00 UTC.

label: Leads
definition: Total leads in the period — every Typeform application that produced a leads row.
weakness: Currently bucketed by created_at in code (Phase 2 migration fixes to typeform_submitted_at per lessons 2026-04-21). 1000-row cap bug currently truncates display.

label: Qualified Leads
definition: Leads meeting qualification criteria (income, fitness goal, decision-maker etc).
differs_from: marketing.leads::qualified is a subset filter on the same lead population
weakness: Qualification rule definition lives in lib/marketing/qualification.ts — changes there change historical comparisons.

label: Leads Booked (by signup date)
definition: Leads that booked a call — counts leads.booked=true bucketed by the date the lead signed up (Typeform submission).
differs_from: sales.calls_scheduled::Sales > Calls Scheduled buckets by call_date (when the call is FOR) and dedupes on (lead_id, call_date) and excludes reschedules. This buckets by signup date. A lead that signed up May 28 with a call scheduled June 3 is in May here, June there. Different stages of the funnel.
weakness: Retro-set rule: leads.booked is also flipped to true if a lead shows or closes (lib/leads/stage.ts:35). Includes direct-DM closes that never went through GHL booking flow.
notes: Was 'Booked' — renamed 2026-05-19 to eliminate same-label divergence with sales cockpit.

label: Paid Leads
definition: Leads from paid traffic sources (Meta etc).

label: Showed
definition: Closer EOD entries with status=showed in period (deduped on lead_id+call_date).
differs_from: sales.calls_taken::Same underlying query. Aligned to deduped form 2026-05-19 (was un-deduped on marketing side previously).
weakness: Sales side dedupes; marketing was un-deduped pre-Phase-2 — for current MTD window the values matched (no dupes) but historical periods may differ.

label: Cost Per Lead
definition: Total ad spend divided by total leads in the period.

label: True ROAS
definition: Payment-verified cash from paid leads divided by Meta ad spend.
weakness: Only includes paid-traffic leads. Direct + organic excluded by design.

label: Cost Per Call
definition: Ad spend divided by calls booked from paid leads.
filter: marketing.spend / count(leads where is_paid=true AND booked=true)

label: Ad Spend Target
definition: Monthly ad spend budget set in /cockpit/settings.

label: Leads Target
definition: Implied leads target — last month's leads OR 3-month average if no explicit target.
target: from prior-period actuals (no explicit target field)
weakness: Pacing baseline currently derived from history not from a hand-set target.

label: Booked Target
definition: Implied booked target — last month's booked OR 3-month average.
weakness: Same pattern as leads_target — no explicit target field.

label: Qualified Target
definition: Implied qualified target — last month's qualified OR 3-month average.

label: Per-Campaign Breakdown
definition: Spend / leads / booked / closed / cash grouped by ad campaign_name.
weakness: Campaign-name based; if campaigns are renamed mid-period the rows split.

label: Per-Ad Breakdown
definition: Spend / leads / booked / closed / cash grouped by ad_id within campaign.

label: Lead Detail Table
definition: Row-per-lead table at the bottom — name, source, qualified/booked/closed/paid badges. Used for drill-down + qualifying.
weakness: Currently the table that hits the 1000-row Supabase cap. Phase 2 fixes via paginateAll().
